q: Renewable energy sources pollute the environment and natural surroundings.
Energy demand forecasting is crucial for ensuring future economic growth and environmental security.
The global supply of energy is currently far greater than the actual demand.
Because the population and new technology are always expanding, demand for energy is expected to increase year by year.
The energy crisis is a situation in which a nation suffers from a disruption of energy supplies connected by increasing energy prices.
Non-renewable resources of energy will last for an extremely long time and can be regained easily once depleted.
Renewable energy has huge potential to provide a solution to the energy crisis and is a key factor for future food and economic security.
The rate of formation of fossil fuels is estimated to be about 4 billion kW.
The rate of consumption of fossil fuel is of a completely different order of magnitude compared to the rate of their formation.
